chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 3032 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.08.2019. Mr. Mumtaz Ahmed Lashari, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Bhatti, Advocate for respondent No.9. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. for the State. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G. alongwith I.O. Farman Ali SHO PS Kot Ghulam Muhammad. = The I.O. has appeared and submits that case bearing Crime No.108/2018 u/s 452, 365-B, 34 PPC of P.S. Kot Ghulam Muhammad has been disposed of under `C` class and petitioner No.1 is residing with petitioner No.2 being his legally wedded wife. Counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition in above terms. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Bhatti appearing for parents of the petitioner No.1 submits that for meeting purpose with petitioner No.1, her parents would avail a proper remedy in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail/PA
